series_metadata.series_description: The log sheet is filled out daily by the employees in the Communication Section for recording all incoming and outgoing phone calls. The log is retained for showing the employee's work production (quantity of phone calls per day)and as a backup to prove that the problems and/or service repairs on the Deputy Registrars' terminials were reported. The log contains the date, operator's initial, Deputy Registrar's agency number, from, to, time, problem and referred to. Distribution: Original - Deputy Registrar Services Division, Deputy Administration; Xerox Copy - Deputy Registrar Services Division, Division Chief; Xerox Copy - Deputy Registrar Services Division, communication Section.
